message:
chore(deps): bump rand 0.10.0 -> 0.10.1 and rand_core 0.10.0 -> 0.10.1

Patch bumps for the `rand` facade (used by fnx-generators) and the
`rand_core` trait crate (used by fnx-algorithms). Both are on the
stable 0.10 series so no API surface changed.

Verified with:
  rch exec -- cargo update -p rand@0.10.0 -p rand_core@0.10.0
  rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets
  rch exec -- cargo test -p fnx-generators -p fnx-algorithms

Note: a 0.9.x `rand` is still in the dep graph via a transitive
  dependency; we only touch the workspace-owned 0.10.x pin.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -265,7 +265,7 @@ checksum = "6f8d983286843e49675a4b7a2d174efe136dc93a18d69130dd18198a6c167601"
 dependencies = [
  "cfg-if",
  "cpufeatures 0.3.0",
- "rand_core 0.10.0",
+ "rand_core 0.10.1",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
@@ -548,7 +548,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "mt19937",
  "mwmatching",

 ]

@@ -146,5 +146,11 @@ library-updater sweep.
 - **Scope:** dev-dependencies of fnx-classes, fnx-convert, fnx-algorithms, fnx-generators, fnx-readwrite, fnx-conformance, fnx-python
 - **Breaking:** None (minor bump; semver-compatible).
 - **Verification:** `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` green; `rch exec -- cargo test -p fnx-classes -p fnx-algorithms` green.
+- **Commit:** 77d22a4
+
+#### rand + rand_core: 0.10.0 -> 0.10.1
+- **Scope:** `rand` in fnx-generators, `rand_core` in fnx-algorithms.
+- **Breaking:** None (patch bumps).
+- **Verification:** `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` green; `rch exec -- cargo test -p fnx-generators -p fnx-algorithms` green (37 passed in fnx-generators suite).
